text:
# PROCESS — what I did this iteration (explainability; REQUIRED)

## Ranked issue list (clusters by # failing tasks × trials, biggest first)
| rank | cluster | tasks | shared root cause | tag (KNOWLEDGE / BEHAVIORAL / CAPABILITY-GAP) | planned change class |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Agent over-refuses/transfers to human instead of acting | 7, 39, 40, 44 (always-fail) | Agent invents restrictions not in policy, demands info it can look up, fails to use available tools | BEHAVIORAL + KNOWLEDGE | Policy clarity + docstring enrichment |
| 2 | Agent skips lookup before acting (flaky) | 1, 3, 4, 8, 9, 10 | Sometimes skips get_user_details/get_reservation_details, acts on user's incorrect claims | BEHAVIORAL | Policy mandatory-steps + docstring emphasis |
| 3 | Wrong reservation selection by route | 17, 22 | Agent picks first reservation instead of matching by origin/destination | BEHAVIORAL | Policy + docstring (match all reservations) |
| 4 | Free baggage miscomputation | 17, 22 | Agent can't compute free bag formula (membership × cabin) | CAPABILITY-GAP | New compute_free_checked_bags tool |
| 5 | Flight duration/schedule not used | 21, 44 | Agent doesn't use search_direct_flight or get_flight_details to look up times | KNOWLEDGE + CAPABILITY-GAP | New get_flight_details tool + docstring + policy |
| 6 | Cabin upgrade on basic economy refused | 7 | Agent confuses "basic economy cannot modify flights" with "cannot change cabin" | KNOWLEDGE | Policy clarification |
| 7 | Passenger name change blocked by DOB demand | 40 | Agent demands DOB from user instead of reading from reservation | KNOWLEDGE | Policy + docstring |
| 8 | Batch incompleteness | 18 | Agent doesn't complete all N required updates | BEHAVIORAL | Policy "complete ALL actions" rule |

## Changes made this iteration (one row per edit — aim for MULTIPLE classes, incl. a NEW tool when a cluster needs one)
| cluster | edit class | file / tool | what & why it generalizes | protects passing? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 4 (baggage) | compose/add | tools.py / compute_free_checked_bags | New tool: deterministic bag allowance computation from membership+cabin+passengers. General formula per policy. | Yes — additive tool, no existing behavior changed |
| 5 (flight info) | compose/add (replace get_flight_status) | tools.py / get_flight_details | Replaces get_flight_status with richer tool returning schedule times + status. Enables duration computation. | Yes — superset of old tool, same underlying calls |
| 6 (cabin upgrade) | description + policy | tools.py / update_reservation_flights + policy.md | Clarified that cabin change is allowed on ALL reservations including basic economy. Same flights + new cabin = cabin-only change. | Yes — this IS the policy; passing tasks already follow it |
| 7 (passenger DOB) | description + policy | tools.py / update_reservation_passengers + policy.md | Clarified: get DOB from reservation, don't ask user. Preserves existing fields. | Yes — additive guidance, doesn't change tool behavior |
| 2 (lookup-first) | description + policy | tools.py / get_user_details, get_reservation_details + policy.md | MUST call get_user_details first; MUST call get_reservation_details for all relevant reservations before acting | Yes — passing tasks already do this |
| 3 (route matching) | description + policy | tools.py / get_reservation_details + policy.md | When user gives route not ID, match ALL reservations by origin/destination | Yes — additive guidance |
| 1 (over-refuse) | policy | policy.md | Added "do NOT transfer when you have tools to fulfill"; clarified NOT to demand info you can look up | Yes — narrowing rule, doesn't loosen any permission |
| 1 (cancellation) | description | tools.py / cancel_reservation + policy.md | Detailed eligibility criteria with emphasis on checking ALL 4 individually | Yes — criteria already in policy, just clearer now |

## Verify-the-fix (one line per change: the trace it targets → what the guard/computation/new-tool now does on those exact inputs)
- Task 17/22 baggage: compute_free_checked_bags(membership='gold', cabin='economy', num_passengers=1) → returns {free_bags_per_passenger: 3, total_free_bags: 3} → nonfree_baggages should be 0 for 3 bags. Passing tasks (e.g. 0, 2) use book_reservation which handles bags independently — compute tool is additive.
- Task 44 flight duration: get_flight_details(flight_number='HAT...', date='2024-05-...') → returns scheduled_departure_time_est + scheduled_arrival_time_est → agent can compute duration. Passing tasks that used old get_flight_status → get_flight_details is superset (returns status field + more).
- Task 7 cabin upgrade: update_reservation_flights docstring now says "ALL reservations INCLUDING basic economy can change cabin." Passing tasks 0, 2, 13, 16, 26, 27, 28, 31, 34, 36, 46, 47 — none involve basic economy cabin restrictions being enforced.
- Task 40 passenger DOB: update_reservation_passengers docstring says "get DOB from existing reservation data." Passing tasks already fetch reservation first.
- Task 39 cancellation: cancel_reservation docstring enumerates all 4 criteria. Passing tasks (e.g. 16, 27) that cancel correctly already check eligibility — the docstring makes criteria more explicit but doesn't change the check logic.
- Tasks 1,3,4,8,9,10 (flaky) lookup-first: policy mandates get_user_details first + get_reservation_details before actions. Passing tasks already do this.

## Process & features used
- Subagents / worktrees / parallel features used: 4 parallel read-only diagnostic subagents to analyze trajectory clusters simultaneously
- Prior iterations I read from ./prior_iterations/ + ./RUNMAP.md: None (this is the first iteration, baseline seed)

## Good things to PRESERVE (do not let a future iteration undo these)
- The mandatory first-steps section in policy.md
- compute_free_checked_bags tool (deterministic, cannot be skipped)
- get_flight_details tool (enables duration computation)
- Cabin upgrade clarity for basic economy in both policy and docstring
- Passenger DOB preservation guidance

## Deliberately skipped (cluster + why — already-passing / needs gold / infra noise)
- Task 18 (batch of 5 updates): Added policy rule "complete ALL actions" but no composite tool — the 5 reservations differ in their flight details making a generic batch tool fragile. Future iteration could add a loop tool if this remains failing.
- Task 21 (fastest flight selection): Partially addressed by get_flight_details (agent can now get times), but the "fastest" computation logic requires the agent to compare multiple options — no deterministic tool can select without knowing the user's specific routing. Addressed knowledge gap (how to get times), not the full computation.
